mission.title: Customer-focused, driven by excellence
mission.body1: CEFA is a Spanish industrial company that researches, develops, and produces plastic components and modules—primarily for the automotive sector with a global presence, applying cutting-edge technologies and differentiating through innovation and flexibility.
mission.body2: Driven by excellence and the satisfaction of our shareholders, employees, and society, we provide continuous value through teamwork and competitiveness.

pillars.title: Certified quality
pillars.text: ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 certified processes for the highest standards.

pillars.title: Continuous innovation
pillars.text: Constant investment in R&D and advanced manufacturing processes.

pillars.title: Global presence
pillars.text: Serving the leading OEMs at an international scale.

values.title: Client's Preferred Partner
values.text: Diversified portfolio, high market share, and robust sales.

values.title: Technological Benchmark
values.text: Innovation and rapid adoption of advanced technologies for responsible value creation.

values.title: Economically Sustainable
values.text: Generating maximum return (EBITDA) for optimized investment.

values.title: A Place to Grow
values.text: High satisfaction and human/professional growth of talented teams.
